message:
test(workflows): add classify/recovery-plan edge case tests for limit handlers

Add 13 tests for HandleClaudeCodeLimits and HandleGeminiQuota covering:

- Claude: classify_limit variants (usage_warning, reset_time vs
  retry_after precedence, fallback), recovery plan safe_to_send
  semantics per limit type, unknown limit fallback
- Gemini: classify_quota rate_limit→reached mapping, recovery plan
  safe_to_send per quota type, unknown quota fallback

Total handler tests: 135 (was 70).

Build: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-tansummit-target --no-default-features
All 135 pass (0.02s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
